scripts.dev: npm run dev:infra && dotnet build Reviews.slnx && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,worker,web -c blue,green,magenta "dotnet watch --project backend/api" "dotnet watch --project backend/worker" "npm --prefix web run start:dev"
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d --wait postgres redis azurite zitadel temporal temporal-ui && docker compose run --rm zitadel-bootstrap
scripts.test: dotnet test Reviews.slnx && npm --prefix web test
scripts.test:e2e: npm --prefix e2e install && npm --prefix e2e exec -- playwright install --with-deps chromium && npm --prefix e2e test
